MINI MINUTES: Erin LaBrache appeared for plaintiff, Gregory Long appeared for defendant

Cause on calendar for case managment conference, plaintiff's motion to compel production of documents and protective order and defendant's motion to quash service of subpoena and for protective order.

Plaintiff's motion to compel is granted, defendant's motion to quash is denied. Defendant is ordered to produce all requested documents or proved privlege log within 60 days. Hearing on defendant's demurrer and further case managmenet conference set for May 10, 2007 at 9:00 AM. Plaintiff's counsel to prepare order.
